notes: Born 1798 in New York. Father Elias L. DuBois (1766-1842, Poughkeepsie). Mother Hannah Hoff (1770-1842). Both parents died on the same day — June 23, 1842 — remarkable. Military service 1818-1832 in New York. Married Catharine Eliza Degroff (1802-) in 1818. Children: Sarah Wilhemina (1819-1819), Barnet Livi (1820-1820), Simon Peter (1821-1821, Poughkeepsie — three infant deaths), John (1831), Barnet (1833-1872), David (1835), Rachel Sara (1839-1890), Mary (1841, PA). Lost three children in infancy in Poughkeepsie. Died August 9, 1844 in Kentucky at age 46, when Rachel was only 4.
